title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 379.1540 - Supervising business entity, sanctioning of license, when
text:
379.1540.  Supervising business entity, sanctioning of license, when. — The license of a supervising business entity may be suspended, revoked, renewal refused, or an application refused if the director finds that a violation by a portable electronics insurance vendor was known or should have been known by the supervising business entity and the violation was neither reported to the director nor correction action taken.  A violation of this section is a level three violation under section 374.049.
(L. 2011 S.B. 132) 
Effective 1-01-12
